description: Composition Maroon sleeveless vest made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed V-neck and armholes, navy blue stripes on the chest and a ribbed hemline Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Dry inside out in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Enjoy the chilly weather this winter in this maroon sleeveless vest from genesis. The ribbed V-neck and armholes add to your masculine look, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you warm and comfortable all day long. Team this with a shirt, jeans and leather slip-ons. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height-6 and Shoulders-18"
